---
title: "Quick Start"
description: "Get your environment ready and run your first analysis in under 10 minutes."
---

This section gets you from zero to a working local environment with market data flowing
and your first signal transform running.

## Prerequisites

- Python **3.11+**
- Git
- A terminal (PowerShell, bash, or zsh)

## Steps

1. [Environment Setup](setup.qmd) — clone the repo, create a virtual environment, install dependencies
2. Fetch your first dataset *(coming soon)*
3. Run your first Fourier transform *(coming soon)*
